citations.claim: Darkbloom is designed as an EigenInference provider agent for Apple Silicon Macs with comprehensive architecture documentation
The CLI interface implements 19 subcommands for comprehensive provider management
Coordinator client manages WebSocket connections with automatic reconnection and handles inference request routing
Backend manager implements health monitoring and automatic restart for inference engines
In-process engine provides Phase 3 security by running inference inside the hardened Rust process via PyO3
Security module implements PT_DENY_ATTACH, SIP verification, and memory wiping for runtime protection
Hardware detection module identifies Apple Silicon capabilities including chip family, memory, and GPU cores
Crypto engine implements ephemeral X25519 keypairs for end-to-end encryption with memory protection
Model discovery scans HuggingFace cache and computes SHA-256 fingerprints for weight verification
Telemetry system implements async batching with disk overflow and structured event collection
HTTP server provides legacy local-only proxy with OpenAI-compatible endpoints quarantined for debug use
WebSocket protocol defines comprehensive message types for provider-coordinator communication
Complete dependency specification with version constraints and feature flags
Service management integrates with macOS launchd for user-controlled provider lifecycle
Build script configures coordinator URLs and links Swift Secure Enclave library for compilation
